channel.title: blog on istvn.urbn
channel.description: Recent content in blog on istvn.urbn

item.title: init
item.description: In the past – which was like 20 years ago – I had a personal website hosted on UltraWEB’s free offering. It was a place where I was able to tinker with stuff learned in Computer Science class and express my thoughts in an unrestricted but still structural way.
item.content:encoded:
In the past – which was like 20 years ago – I had a personal website hosted on UltraWEB’s free offering. It was a place where I was able to tinker with stuff learned in Computer Science class and express my thoughts in an unrestricted but still structural way.

I decided to start something of a blog again with the following goals:

  • enhance my written English while I articulate my thoughts
  • keep a log of stuff I do
  • provide useful info for likeminded folks

Since I’m still a very curious person, the content will cover a wide variety of topics that interest me. With that said, expect no consistency.

See you around!
